Propitiations for benefic satum:
1. Wear blue sapphire (neelam) on saturday set in silver or
iron ring or locket touching the skin after purifying it with
milk ar"'d gangdjaL Mantra of Saturn is: 'Om shan shanacharaya
namah:
2. Wear blue clothes on Saturday.
3. Do business of articles related to Satum planet. They are :
iron. black dal. oil, buffalo. blaCk dog, black horse. machinety
etc.
4. Mak~ sabut maha (umd) dal at home.
5. Wear horse shoe ring or bangle on Saturday.
